query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "citevqa: benchmarking evidence attribution for trustworthy document in" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it investigates the same core mechanism (evidence attribution and citation fidelity in RAG systems) and measures the same dependent variable (trustworthiness/hallucination reduction via citations) within the broader domain of document-centric question answering, serving as a canonical methodological reference for extending the "CiteVQA" benchmark to specific high-stakes domains.
